summary: The user is planning a solo trip to San Antonio next month and is seeking hotel recommendations, attractions to visit, and details about local events. They expressed interest in staying at Omni hotels, visiting the Alamo, exploring the River Walk and the Pearl District, and attending the Pearl Farmers Market.
facts: The user is planning a solo trip to San Antonio next month. The user had a good experience with Omni hotels when they attended a wedding in Austin, Texas, and checked into the Omni Barton Creek Resort. The user is considering visiting the Alamo while in San Antonio. The Alamo is located at 300 Alamo Plaza, San Antonio, TX 78205, and is open daily from 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM. The user is thinking of visiting the River Walk while in San Antonio. The River Walk is a 15-mile path lined with restaurants, bars, shops, and hotels. The user is considering exploring the Pearl District while on the River Walk. The Pearl District is located at the north end of the River Walk and features a variety of shops, restaurants, and the historic Pearl Brewery. The user has heard great things about the Pearl Farmers Market, which is held every Saturday from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM at the Pearl Brewery complex. The user is thinking of exploring the San Antonio Missions National Historical Park during their visit. The San Antonio Missions National Historical Park includes four Spanish colonial missions located along the San Antonio River.
